description_long: This rifle features a unique, steampunk-inspired design with a robust, cylindrical body and three large, flared barrels at the front. The surface is predominantly a weathered green metal with visible patina, accented by brass or bronze fittings and mechanical components. The rear section includes a pistol-style grip and a trigger assembly, while the top is fitted with a small, tubular sighting device. Several mechanical levers and adjustment knobs are distributed along the body, suggesting complex internal mechanisms. The barrels are clustered together, each with a wide, trumpet-like opening, giving the weapon an unconventional and imposing appearance. The overall construction appears heavy and solid, with a mix of industrial and vintage aesthetics.
description: A heavy, steampunk-style rifle with three large, flared barrels, green patina metalwork, and brass mechanical fittings. Features a pistol grip, tubular sight, and multiple adjustment levers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three wide, flared barrels arranged in a triangular cluster, emphasizing the weapon's imposing muzzle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, flared barrels, the main cylindrical body, pistol grip, and visible sighting device on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the rifle, the grip, and the alignment of the barrels, as well as the mechanical levers on the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same main features as view 1, with additional detail on the mechanical fittings and adjustment knobs.
